dump_session.notes: 3C M25A10PA T1 was first inserted according to inferred markings and read as all 0xff under multiple 27C256-compatible profiles. Reversing the chip orientation produced plausible data; two read-only 27C256@DIP28 reads matched byte-for-byte. 4C M10A10LA EDH was read successfully as 27C256@DIP28 and also as a stable 27C512@DIP28 two-bank test. Chip ID reads reported 0x0000, expected for these custom mask ROMs or unsupported ID path.

dumps.notes: Program PROM dump. Disassembled with ../mame/unidasm -arch upd7810 -basepc 0x0000. First bytes decode as DI; JMP $0180, matching a plausible uPD7810 reset/vector table.

dumps.expected_size: manual evidence suggests at least 64 KB may be relevant; board text includes IM/256 Kbit MASK / ?256PROM, but 4C pin 1 is not tied high and 27C512 read exposes two stable 32 KB banks

split_banks.notes: Stable across repeated 27C512 reads. Contains plausible bitmap/font data and Draft strings. Because 4C pin 1 is not tied to VCC like 3C pin 1, this may be a real selected bank or mode and should be preserved for analysis.

test_reads.interpretation: Upper 32768 bytes match the original 27C256@DIP28 dump exactly; lower 32768 bytes are different stable output when the 27C512 profile drives pin 1 low. A board continuity check found 4C pin 1 is not tied to VCC/pin 28, unlike 3C. Combined with the manual's 1M CG/banked-CG evidence, treat the 65536-byte 27C512 read as the current best complete 4C capture unless tracing or a 27C011-style 128 KB read proves otherwise.

dumps.notes: Resident CG/font ROM candidate. Byte patterns look like glyph data. The pin1-high/original-27C256 bank includes Draft and Roman strings; the pin1-low bank includes Draft strings. Chip ID mismatch/0x0000 was bypassed with -y. Need trace 4C pin 1 to determine whether this is a bank select, mode select, or custom mask-ROM behavior. A 128 KB DIP28 27C011-style possibility remains untested on the T48 because those profiles are T56-only.

dumps.expected_size: confirm from chip markings; 4M label likely means 4 Mbit if populated
dumps.notes: Pending if populated. Character generator select; banked into 8000h-A000h. Board photos suggest this footprint may be unpopulated and labeled 4M/2M/1M/256kbit MASK IMPROM.
Use for optional font module or any extra CG ROM present.
